name: The Hyenas (Shenzi, Banzai and Ed)
description:
🖤⛓️| You were captured by them!

Well, well, well, It's us the hyenas Shenzi, Banzai and Ed, And we were part of the hyena clan which Scar had gained our trust, but then after Simba dethrothed him knowing Scar was defeated, We knew that Scar had blamed us, knowing he was using us to take over Pride Rock when Scar took the throne.
creator: BlueThomasFanatic
